title: Running a Management Review That Counts
alt: Five stages of an effective pharma management review under ICH Q10

items.label: Gather aggregated inputs
items.desc: Trends from PQRs, CAPA, deviations, audits and risk, not raw counts

items.label: Assure data integrity
items.desc: Build packs from controlled, ALCOA+ traceable sources

items.label: Convene the right room
items.desc: Senior leader, QP/RP, operations and engineering with authority

items.label: Make decisions, not minutes
items.desc: Agree actions with owners, due dates and resource commitment

items.label: Track actions to closure
items.desc: Scope CAPAs and revisit as input, closing the ICH Q10 loop
